{"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"api_error_status":null,"duration_ms":879313,"duration_api_ms":757940,"num_turns":64,"result":"Phase 1 (`backend-relocate-unify`) 완료. 커밋 `802c623a`.

**변경 요약**
- `webhard-api/src/folders/_lib/resolve-company-root.util.ts` 신설 — Company → name 완전일치 → 정규화 매칭 3단계 단일 진입점.
- `folders.service.ts:ensureInquiryFolder` 의 인라인 3단계 탐색을 `resolveCompanyRoot` 호출로 단순화. NO_COMPANY_ROOT 시 `initializeCompanyFolders` 후 재시도.
- `folders.service.ts:relocateContactFiles` silent bail-out 제거 — Company 미등록 가상 업체도 fallback rootFolder 로 정상 이동. `companyId === null` 시 inquiryNumber/companyId OR 절은 skip하고 revisionFileIds 경로만 사용.
- `contacts.service.ts` 의 `findAll`/`findOne`/`getChildren` 응답에 `webhard_file_id` 필드 추가 — 최신 DrawingRevision 의 `webhardFileIds[0]`. findAll 은 N+1 회피용 batch 쿼리, getChildren 은 기존 include 된 drawingRevisions 재활용.
- `src/lib/types/contact.ts` 에 `webhard_file_id?: string | null` 동기화.
- `folders.service.spec.ts:stubBasicContext` 에 `webhardFolder.findFirst` stub 보강 — `resolveCompanyRoot` 1단계 (companyId 기반 root folder 조회) 대응.

**AC 검증** — backend 35 suites/580 tests 통과, frontend `tsc --noEmit` 클린. `index.json` phase 1 status `completed`.","stop_reason":"end_turn","session_id":"6a7cfff7-4740-473f-98b3-9e0b2fac001a","total_cost_usd":6.559391499999998,"usage":{"input_tokens":760,"cache_creation_input_tokens":307372,"cache_read_input_tokens":6547033,"output_tokens":54440,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":307372,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[{"input_tokens":1,"output_tokens":624,"cache_read_input_tokens":220279,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1280,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":1280},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"},"modelUsage":{"claude-opus-4-7[1m]":{"inputTokens":760,"outputTokens":54440,"cacheReadInputTokens":6547033,"cacheCreationInputTokens":307372,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":6.559391499999998,"contextWindow":1000000,"maxOutputTokens":64000}},"permission_denials":[],"terminal_reason":"completed","fast_mode_state":"off","uuid":"0fb5f4b0-75e7-46ad-9ef3-0c09479484ea"}
